en: Coordination of hazard prevention among employers at shared workplaces must be ensured. Agreed protective measures for external employees based on workplace hazards must be determined and implemented.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 8(1)(1), 8(2)(3), 8(2)(4)
Mutual information on workplace hazards to employers, employees, and representatives must be ensured.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 8(1)(2), 9(4)
Hazard information and appropriate instruction for external employees must be provided.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 8(2)(1)
